news.t: How to avoid Treasury bond panic and still get 'peace of mind' income from the market

overview.description: The LifeX 2035 Income Bucket ETF (LDDR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages US Treasury exposure, aiming to provide predictable cashflows through 2035. The fund seeks fixed monthly distributions of $0.0833 per share. LDDR was launched on Jan 6, 2025 and is issued by Stone Ridge.
